nasb.text: But if you will not do so, behold, you have sinned against the Lord, and be sure your sin will find you out.

esv.text: But if you will not do so, behold, you have sinned against the Lord, and be sure your sin will find you out.

cnv.text: 如果你們不這樣行，就得罪了耶和華；你們要知道你們的罪必追上你們。

ccb.text: 但如果你们不守承诺，就是得罪耶和华，必难逃惩罚。
